title: onobrychis crista-galli var. ligulifera
intro: Onobrychis crista-galli var. ligulifera is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is also known as sainfoin, a perennial legume used as hay for horses due to its high nutritional value. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis crista-galli var. ligulifera include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
